title: LongBench v2
description: Evolve the editable solver independently for each LongBench v2 long-context multiple-choice question, using a prepared local manifest and per-item cached context files.
baseline_summary: A placeholder long-context solver template that returns the first available answer choice.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved LongBench v2 question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The active item is a single long-context multiple-choice reasoning question. The full context may be large and is still available at runtime in question['context']; write a local heuristic over question['prompt'], question['context'], and question['choices'] without any network access.
